name: Weird Wormholes
short_description: Weird Wormholes is a casual game about traveling through wormholes to try and get back home. Use your ship to mine planets for resources and process these resources into components to enable your travels.
detailed_description:
Weird Wormholes is a casual game about traveling through wormholes to try and get back home.

Use your ship to mine planets for resources and process these resources into components to enable your travels or to trade with local Space Stations.

Local Space Stations will sell you upgrades to speed up and assist you in your endeavors.

The idea behind the game is centered around a relaxing and casual game play. There is no way to die or loose, just more efficient ways of doing tasks.

In-game features:

  • Mine planets for resources

  • Refine resources using your ships onboard smelter

  • Use refined resources to manufacture items to enable you travels through wormholes

  • Trade with local space stations to upgrade your ship

  • Several purchasable incremental-like generators you can invest in to passively improve your ship

supported_languages: English, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America
